When a Grok or other AI thread designed Automata (Tauri Pad, WebGPU body, philosophical flow, security, tickets) but only simulated git history, scrape quarry via claude-chat-reader, emit real files to marvelousempire/automata, update agents/automata-ticket.md pointer, witness each slice.
